heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Highs from the mid 30s to around 40, except southern valleys in the low to mid 40s. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy south. Becoming mostly cloudy north, with scattered snow showers or flurries from the Adirondacks and Route 2 northward. Lows from the mid 20s to around 30 south and in the Champlain Valley, low to mid 20s elsewhere north. West winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming light and variable east of the Greens

heading: Wednesday
text: Variable clouds. Chance of early snow showers from the Adirondacks and Route 2 northward. Highs from the mid 40s to around 50 south, and upper 30s to lower 40s north, some mid 30s far north. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming southwest in southern areas, and in the Champlain Valley.
